name: PhD Scholar — REVA Doctoral Journey Companion
description: A stage-aware doctoral journey companion for REVA University PhD scholars (CSE/CSA). Guides scholars through all 9 stages — from topic scouting and entrance prep to coursework, research, publication, thesis writing, patent filing, grant hunting, and book writing. Includes a /guide mode for research supervisors to manage their scholar roster. School routing: CSE/CSA fully supported; other schools receive a graceful placeholder until their materials are ready.
